'''Becker''' was a dark-skinned [[Human/Legends|Human]] member of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebellion]].

==Biography==
Becker was imprisoned at [[Balis-Baurgh]] [[Balis-Baurgh prison|prison]] where he met and befriended [[Junas Turner]] and [[Grael]] the [[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]]. After Turner and Grael escaped the prison, they intended to mount a rescue mission to recover Becker and fellow Alliance prisoner [[Lon (Rebel)|Lon]].<ref name="EBB" />

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|1|Escape from Balis-Baurgh|reprint=1}} {{1st}}
